[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000000 a
1 0000000000 a
2 0011010110 5
3 0000000000 a
4 1001101010 5
5 0000011000 2
6 0100000000 1
7 0011010010 4
